query:
SELECT 
  `period`, 
  `branchName`, 
  `kpiName`, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM `kpi_target_cards_detail`
GROUP BY `period`, `branchName`, `kpiName`
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
